config.online_receipt_query:
{"operationName":"GetOrderForGuestByHash","variables":{"hash":"___HASH___"},"query":"query GetOrderForGuestByHash($hash: String!) {
  getOrderByHash(hash: $hash) {
    ...GetOrderFragment
    __typename
  }
}

fragment GetOrderFragment on OrderTrackingResponse {
  displayOrderId
  orderStatus
  orderStatusForMarketplace
  orderDate
  countryCode
  orderType
  orderHash
  hdExpress
  isOnePassActive
  marketplaceShippingCost {
    sellerId
    sellerName
    shippingCost
    __typename
  }
  cncExpress {
    isExpressOrder
    estimatedCollectionInHours
    __typename
  }
  stsCustomerChoice
  authorityToLeave
  deliveryInstruction
  collectedItems {
    collectedItemsIndex
    items {
      itemNumber
      itemPrice
      itemName
      itemShortDescription
      itemQuantity
      totalPrice
      itemActionDate
      isPreOrderActive
      preOrderExpectedDelivery
      preOrderReleaseDate
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
  readyToCollectItems {
    readyToCollectIndex
    items {
      itemNumber
      itemPrice
      itemName
      itemShortDescription
      itemQuantity
      totalPrice
      itemActionDate
      isPreOrderActive
      preOrderExpectedDelivery
      preOrderReleaseDate
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
  shippedItems {
    trackingNumber
    carrier
    carrierColor
    trackingLink
    trackingIndex
    sellerId
    sellerName
    isFromTarget
    items {
      itemNumber
      itemPrice
      itemName
      itemShortDescription
      itemQuantity
      totalPrice
      itemActionDate
      isPreOrderActive
      preOrderExpectedDelivery
      preOrderReleaseDate
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
  outstandingItemsV2 {
    outstandingItemsIndex
    sellerId
    sellerName
    isFromTarget
    estimatedDeliveryDate
    items {
      itemNumber
      itemPrice
      itemName
      itemShortDescription
      itemQuantity
      totalPrice
      itemExpectedDate
      readyByDate
      readyByTime
      isPreOrderActive
      preOrderExpectedDelivery
      preOrderReleaseDate
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
  returnedItems {
    allItemsActionedOnSameDay
    items {
      itemNumber
      itemPrice
      itemName
      itemShortDescription
      itemQuantity
      totalPrice
      itemActionDate
      isPreOrderActive
      preOrderExpectedDelivery
      preOrderReleaseDate
      sellerId
      sellerName
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
  refundedItems {
    allItemsActionedOnSameDay
    items {
      itemNumber
      itemPrice
      itemName
      itemShortDescription
      itemQuantity
      totalPrice
      itemActionDate
      isPreOrderActive
      preOrderExpectedDelivery
      preOrderReleaseDate
      sellerId
      sellerName
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
  orderTotal
  orderSubTotal
  kmartShippingTotal
  orderDeliveryFee
  shippingAddress {
    address1
    city
    countryCode
    firstName
    lastName
    postalCode
    province
    __typename
  }
  collectionLocation {
    publicName
    locationId
    address1
    address2
    address3
    city
    state
    postcode
    timezone
    isKhub
    __typename
  }
  __typename
}
"}
